  1. org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc
Base package that contains autoconfiguration for the Gateway Server WebMVC.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.common
Package that contains commons shared classes and interfaces.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config
Package that contains implementation of creating RouterFunctions from external configuration.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.filter
Package that contains implementations of FilterFunctions.
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.handler
Package that contains advanced classes for adapting WebMVC.fn to an API Gateway.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.config used by org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc
    Class
    Description
    GatewayMvcProperties
     
    RouterFunctionHolderFactory
    Factory bean for the creation of a RouterFunctionHolder, that may have refresh scope.
